core_mechanism: variable-splitting with alternating block minimization and dual-multiplier updates (alternating direction method of multipliers): a coupled constrained optimization is made partially separable by introducing auxiliary variables and constraints, then solved by cyclically minimizing over disjoint blocks of variables while updating Lagrange multipliers at each iteration
brief_reason: The abstract states the method reformulates the problem into partially separable objectives by adding new variables and constraints and then applies an (in)exact alternating direction method that updates both primal and dual variables at every iteration.
